title: Chi Gets Lost
overview: Chi ends up lost when walking with her family.

title: Chi is Picked Up
overview: Chi is found by a young boy and his mother.

title: Chi Has a Tough Time
overview: Mr. and Mrs. Yamada try to give Chi a bath.

title: Chi Forgets
overview: Chi wants to go home, but is distracted by a number of new experiences.

title: Chi Begins
overview: Settling into her new home, Chi struggles to understand where the toilet is.

title: Chi Continues
overview: After Chi mistakes his bag for a toilet, Mr. Yamada sets out to buy a litter box for her.

title: Chi Gets Disappointed
overview: The newspaper Chi was playing on is replaced with a litter box.

title: Chi Understands
overview: Chi believes she understands why people say a certain word to her a lot.

title: Chi Remembers
overview: Chi remembers her mother and tries to go out and find her.

title: Chi Dreams
overview: Asleep after a long day, Chi has dreams and nightmares about her past.

title: Chi is Adopted
overview: The Yamada family believes they've found a new owner for Chi, but Chi isn't so sure.

title: Chi Decides
overview: The Yamada family decides to keep Chi as they can't give her to anyone.

title: Chi Gets Excited
overview: Yohei is told to clear up some bouncy balls, but Chi knocks them down.

title: Chi Accepts
overview: Mr. Yamada worries that Chi doesn't have any toys.

title: Chi Plays
overview: Chi has a bundle of new toys, but doesn't know what to do with them.

title: Chi Gets In the Way
overview: Mr. Yamada is trying to work. Chi has other ideas.

title: Chi Runs Away
overview: After Mrs. Yamada frightens her, Chi dashes out of the apartment.

title: Chi Takes a Walk
overview: Chi discovers the world outside the apartment.

title: Chi Explores
overview: While Yohei searches for her outside, Chi has fun discovering the local park.

title: Chi Is Left Alone
overview: The park becomes lonely and scary at night.

title: Chi Goes to the Hospital (Part 1)
overview: It's time for Chi's health checkup, but how to smuggle her out?

title: Chi Goes to the Hospital (Part 2)
overview: The landlady nearly spots Chi, but Yohei's quick thinking saves the day.

title: Chi Goes to the Hospital (Part 3)
overview: Chi's first medical check-up is a traumatic experience.

title: Chi Hates
overview: Chi is afraid that Mr. Yamada wants to take her for another check-up, and won't come near him.

title: Chi Obsesses
overview: Chi wants to scratch something. Unfortunately, her objects of choice are very expensive.

title: Chi Chooses
overview: Mr. Yamada gets a new pair of jeans, but Chi prefers the old ones.

title: Chi Misunderstands
overview: The Yamadas buy Chi a board to scratch, but she isn't sure what it's meant to do.

title: Chi Gets Her Claws Clipped
overview: Mr. Yamada undertakes the dangerous mission of clipping Chi's claws.

title: Chi Prevents From Leaving
overview: Mrs. Yamada needs to go shopping, but Chi wants to come along for the ride.

title: Chi is Lured
overview: Things are inexplicably boring around Chi's house, and dinner is unusually large... a conspiracy is afoot to help her become independent.

title: Chi House Sits (Part 1)
overview: It's Chi's first day home alone, but Mr. Yamada is worried about her.

title: Chi House Sits (Part 2)
overview: Chi learns that an apartment without humans in it isn't as delightful as it seemed.

title: Chi Finds
overview: Mrs. Yamada needs to take out the trash, but Chi clings to the bag. Mrs. Yamada distracts Chi with a ball, but while Mrs. Yamada is out, Chi climbs up to the window and is almost seen.

title: Chi Wants to See
overview: Mrs. Yamada takes away the books and boxes so Chi can't climb to the window. However, when Chi jumps, she's just a few inches short of reaching the windowsill.

title: Chi Sees
overview: Chi is able to jump up to the windowsill, so Mrs. Yamada closes the door to Mr. Yamada's workroom. This angers Chi. Mr. Yamada buys a stuffed animal.

title: Chi Is Found
overview: When talking with some neighbors outside, Mrs. Yamada thinks they've seen Chi in the window. However, it was the stuffed animal that Mr. Yamada bought. So, they buy more stuffed animals to put on the windowsill so Chi blends in.

title: Chi is Deeply Moved
overview: Chi searches for a delicious snack, then later eats Yohei's pancakes and finds them delicious.

title: Chi Has a Quarrel
overview: Chi thinks that everything Yohei plays with is prey. So, Yohei tries to find things Chi will not like, but only makes Chi happier and then she rubs against Yohei's hand.

title: Chi Takes a Bath
overview: Chi becomes suspicious of how much fun Yohei and Dad are having fun in the bath, so she goes in to see what they are doing. After Yohei pours toys in the tub, Chi looks over them and wants to play but unfortunately falls into the tub.

title: Chi Has a Showdown
overview: Yohei and Chi are both annoying each other with their bad sleeping postures, then later sleep comfortably together.

title: Chi Stands Firm
overview: While Chi and Yohei are playing in the sand box, a large black cat appears from behind the bushes. They run inside, but the black cat walks into their home.

title: Chi Encounters
overview: The black cat appears again in the Yamada house and eats Chi's dinner while the others are away.

title: Chi is Edible
overview: After eating Chi's dinner, the black cat picks her up and walks over to take her chew toy and Chi tries to protect it. Then the black cat decides to groom Chi's back and so Chi realizes the cat isn't as mean as it looks. And leaves once again into the bushes.

title: Chi Reports
overview: Everyone tells Dad about the large black cat at dinner.

title: Chi Gets Attention
overview: Chi wants to play with everyone but everyone is too busy. Once they all come together to play with her, she dislikes the attention and walks away.

title: Chi Collects Interest
overview: Chi tries to grab the Yamada family's attention when they sit together and discuss how they should go to Kyoto after seeing a postcard from Grandma.

title: Chi Sticks
overview: Chi is housesitting again and gets her tail stuck to a roll of tape.

title: Chi Feigns Ignorance
overview: Chi tries to remove the tape off her tail, and in the process she wrecks Dad's room.

title: Chi Pursues
overview: Chi follows the black cat and talks to it.

title: Chi Learns
overview: The black cat hides Chi from a dog, then later tells her that she's a cat.

title: Chi Practices
overview: Chi hides from a dog, then can't find her way home.

title: Chi Goes Home
overview: Chi returns home by taking advice from the big black cat by looking at the sky.

title: Chi Rebels
overview: Dad tries to take Chi to the vet, so she runs outside. The land lady almost sees her until the black cat jumps out of a window saving the Yamada family and Chi.

title: Chi Resists
overview: Dad brings out the basket to take Chi to the vet, but Chi knows the basket means she's going to the vet so she runs away every time they try to put her in there... until she traps herself and Yohei catches her.

title: Chi Grows Timid
overview: Chi goes to the vet after Yohei captures her. When she returns home the black cat tells her not to trust humans, but Chi doesn't know what trust is.

title: Chi Finds Comrades
overview: Chi returns home just to eat, but gets a treat of Tuna of tells the Yamada family to be her comrades.

title: Chi Gets Excited
overview: There's a storm coming to the Yamada home.

title: Chi Gets Thrown Out
overview: When Yohei goes outside to get his toy truck from being swept by the storm, Chi is left outside.

title: Chi Surprises
overview: Dad finds Chi outside the window in the storm.

title: Chi Chases
overview: The power goes out in the Yamada house, so Dad brings out the flashlight and Chi chases it, then Mom and Yohei all play with Chi with the flashlight in the dark.

title: Chi Cuddles
overview: Yohei becomes ill, but Chi still wants to play. So she stands over him while he sleeps, then eventually cuddles and sleeps next to him.

title: Chi Stays Close
overview: Mom becomes sick so Yohei tries to help her.

title: Chi Turns Around
overview: After Yohei and Mom are no longer ill, Dad catches a cold.

title: Chi Annoys
overview: Dad is trying to get better but all Chi wants to do is play.

title: Chi Wants
overview: Chi tries a tasty cat treat and refuses to eat her dinner.

title: Chi Sulks
overview: Yohei and Dad are out, so Mom catches up on some housework and accidentally scares Chi while cleaning the floors, so she bribes her with snacks.

title: Chi Finds
overview: While getting ready to go out Mrs. Yamada loses her ring, Chi then helps her find her ring

title: Chi Kneads
overview: Chi looks for a place to nap, then ends up kneading and falling asleep on Mrs. Yamada.

title: Chi Thinks
overview: Chi gets a taste of milk and ends up wanting more, so she tries to think of a way to get more, but ends up eventually forgetting about the milk while playing with a plastic bag.

title: Chi Tastes
overview: The Yamadas decide to make a meal for Chi, but when they give it to her they forget to let the meal cool off.

title: Chi Overeats
overview: Chi finds where her food is stored and ends up eating all she wants. Mr. and Mrs. Yamada then worry if she's sick.

title: Chi Hangs Around
overview: While the Yamadas eat dinner they end up giving bits of their food to Chi which makes her believe all food on the table is yummy. To make her stop begging for their food they put her cat food dish on the table.

title: Chi Sheds
overview: Chi's shedding season has started leaving fur all over the house. Then a woman from the neighborhood stops by, so the Yamadas have to hide Chi and all her fur as well!

title: Chi Gets Brushed
overview: Chi's shedding so Mr. Yamada decides to buy a brush for Chi. Chi ignores Mr. Yamada's attempt to brush her a first but once he starts she really likes being combed!

title: Chi Likes
overview: Chi really likes being brushed so she ends up following Mr. Yamada everywhere asking to be brushed. Chi ends up getting brushed so often that Mr. Yamada's arm starts to get tired.

title: Chi Breaks
overview: After being brushed Chi leaves fur on the brush which Yohei then collects until he has enough for a large ball. When Mr. Yamada discovers what Yohei has been doing the family talks about it until Chi grabs the ball of fur and starts to play with it sending fur flying everywhere

title: Chi Doesn't Get It
overview: Chi and Yohei both want to play but seem to have different definitions of fun, Mrs. Yamada then tells them to clean up so they can have snacks.

title: Chi Hides
overview: Chi and Yohei decide to play hide-and-seek.

title: Chi Hides Some More
overview: Playing hide-and-seek with Yohei, Chi hides in a dresser drawer, but when Yohei goes to have a snack he forgets about finding Chi.

title: Chi Is Found
overview: Yohei remembers the game of hide-and-seek and the Yamadas start looking for Chi, while Chi wakes up and tries to escape the drawer.

title: Chi Learns
overview: Chi learns how to open the screen door when the black bear cat shows her how, Chi also learns How to mark her territory and hunt prey.

title: Chi Fails
overview: Chi continues to follow the black bear cat, then chases pigeons. No matter what Chi does shes can't catch any pigeons

title: Chi Plays a Game
overview: Chi chases pigeons while the black bear cat watches but she can't catch any. After being laughed at by a pigeons, the black bear cat tells Chi to sneak up on the pigeons using the bushes.

title: Chi is Seen
overview: While Chi and the black bear cat head home, they spot another cat urinating on a car. Black bear cat, furious because the car is part of his territory, chases the other cat away. Unfortunately, the car's owner sees the urine on his bumper and blames the black bear cat. Chi and the black bear cat are forced to flee to Chi's house.

title: Chi Opens
overview: Chi opens the screen door and tries to go outside when Yohei stops her. As the Yamadas try to figure out why the screen door was left opens they then watch as Chi opens the screen door again and tries to escape, again.

title: Chi Hides
overview: The landlady drops by for a visit so the Yamadas must hide Chi from her.

title: Chi Hides More
overview: With the landlady visiting, Youkei and Chi hide in the bathroom but because Chi wants to play, the Yamadas have to try to make up excuses so she doesn't find Chi.

title: Chi Makes Peace
overview: Mr. and Mrs. Yamada discuss what they should do with Chi but Chi keeps distracting them by wanting to play.

title: Chi is Photographed
overview: Mr. Yamada wants to take a picture of Chi but every time he is about to take the picture Chi moves, so when they finally get her to look at the camera, Chi really doesn't like the flash.

title: Chi is Attacked
overview: Juri comes over for a visit but Chi doesn't seem to happy about her coming, deciding she can't let her guard down around Juri.

title: Chi is Interested
overview: Juri's brought a Crab with her from her home and Chi's interested in the live crab; Juri decides to pet Chi but is a little too rough.

title: Chi Hits it Off
overview: Chi's taken a liking to Juri and they start playing, leaving Yohei feeling left out.

title: Chi Learns
overview: Chi follows the black bear cat outside; the black bear cat and Chi try to steal food but end up being seen by the landlady and another resident.

title: Chi is Cornered
overview: Chi and the black bear cat escape from the landlady and are chased outside, meanwhile Yohei and Mrs. Yamada look for Chi and end up seeing Chi and the black bear cat's escape.

title: Chi Rests
overview: Chi and the black bear cat escape from the landlady by taking refuge in the black bear cat's home, But the landlady finds out where the black bear cat is staying so they have to escape out the window. Yohei and Mrs. Yamada continue to follow Chi's trail.

title: Chi Learns
overview: Chi must jump out the window to the roof of another building but is too scared to do so, so the black bear cat tells her to "smile and look forward" giving her the courage to jump. Then while Chi and the black bear cat are getting down from the roof using a tree, Yohei seeing the black bear cat helping Chi.

title: Chi Strives
overview: The Yamadas discuss how Chi was seen by the landlady, while Chi climbs the curtains and ends up stuck and tangled.

title: Chi Desires
overview: The landlady sends out a notice stating that pets are forbidden in the apartments but Chi wants to go outside and visit the black bear cat.

title: Chi Waits
overview: Chi is sad that she's not allowed to go outside and play with the black bear cat so Chi waits by the door all day wishing to go out, while Mr. and Mrs. Yamada discuss whats best for Chi.

title: Chi Begs
overview: Chi is sad and staring at the Moon wanting to go outside when the black bear cat appears at the door, Chi then begs Yohei to open the door so that Chi can play with the black bear cat and Yohei gives in and opens the door making Chi happy.

title: Chi Promises
overview: The black bear cat brings Chi a "souvenir" and plays with her. Then as the black bear cat leaves Chi asks for the black bear cat to play with her again later and the black bear cat agrees, then leaves.

title: Chi Sees Off
overview: The Yamadas and Chi watch as the black bear cat and his family pack up and move and as the black bear cat leaves Chi doesn't realize the black bear cat is moving.

title: Chi Cries
overview: The black bear cat moves away so Chi is sad.

title: Chi Discovers
overview: Chi discovers that the black bear cat is still there, she just can't see him.
